1.prompt: You are a poor peasant named Kronk, you were sitting in the alley of the streets waiting to starve, as you had not eaten in weeks. However, right as all hope of survival seemingly evaporated, a light appeared in front of you…

2.prompt: As the light began to dull back down, and your eyes readjusted, you saw a man. The man, appearing confused, asked “Where am I? I seem to be lost.” As you explained to him the nature of the planet you inhabit, Borox, he gave a smile. Before he leaves he says “You seem to be in a desolate situation, but do not give up hope. Take this not as an end, but as a beginning for something greater.”

3.prompt: As the man walked away, you used the last of your energy to catch up to him, and to grab his attention, you yelled:  “I’ll pay you 100,000 dollars if you’d be so kind as to take me along with you!” The man, not being a native didn’t grasp the exact value of this money, but he assumes it’s a lot. Given your situation, he was skeptical you even had that money, but you promised you’d work for him till’ the day you drop to pay the debt.

4.prompt: After many years under his control, you learned much about the man you once thought would save you. He was not benevolent, and he did not accept you out of the good of his heart, as he was an evil man with despicable intentions.

5.prompt: After he amassed great wealth off your back and became a part of the kingdom’s ruling class, he took you for granted and began using you to further his horrible dreams. You, now being in this situation, desperately wish you could run away and be free of him. However, before you found out what kind of man he was, you signed a contract which stated the only way to be free was to either pay 100,000 dollars, or find true love.

6.prompt: After years of his torment he finally decided to give you some freedom; After 8 pm you are free to do as you wish without his oversight. Even after years of saving to pay off your debt, you only manage to save a measly 200 dollars, which is hardly a fraction of what you need to be free.

7.prompt: To pay your debt, you’ve decided that in order to make money you should sell illegal potions to others. You pitch this idea to Netanyahu as a business venture to grow his wealth, but you secretly plan to use it as a means to escape him. Your plan is to get married to one of the customers after building up a relationship before the 4 day test period ends, so that you can be forever free. But beware: if you bankrupt the business, Netanyahu will use his bombs to punish you, and if you perform too well with every customer, then Netanyahu will see your success and become madly in love, and then force you to marry him, foiling your plan forever.
